title: I have questions not sure where they should go
display_title: I have questions not sure where they should go
wikitext:
[]: I have questions (not sure where they should go).             Quote Post by MicroBalrog » Mon Oct 12, 2009 7:22 am 1. Where Misato's appartment located? ON the Geofront's floor or in Tokyo-3? Is it possible to observe any of the events (Angel battles) from its roof? 2. Is there any fan consensus or Word of God as to how much time occurs between the different events of the series? 3. It's clear Pen-Pen is sapient - we see him manipulating complex objects, we see him reading a newspaper, etc. But - does Misato know it?

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Mon Oct 12, 2009 8:23 am 1. There was a map somewhere that marked the location of Misato's apartment as being in the northwest of Tokyo-3 (I have a feeling she wasn't allowed an apartment in the GeoFront because of Pen-Pen). 2. There's a rough timeline here: http://wiki.evageeks.org/Category:Neon_Genesis_Evangelion_Episodes, based off some calculated guesswork based on the TV show chronology 3. (I'll try and answer this when I'm a bit more awake...)

[]: Re: I have questions (not sure where they should go).             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Oct 12, 2009 8:30 am MicroBalrog wrote: 1. Where Misato's appartment located? ON the Geofront's floor or in Tokyo-3? Is it possible to observe any of the events (Angel battles) from its roof? 2. Is there any fan consensus or Word of God as to how much time occurs between the different events of the series? 3. It's clear Pen-Pen is sapient - we see him manipulating complex objects, we see him reading a newspaper, etc. But - does Misato know it?

[]:             Quote Post by MicroBalrog » Mon Oct 12, 2009 8:59 am 3: He gets anthropomorphized a bit, but I only ever looked at it as being cartoony, not as him literally being intelligent enough to read. That's a bit of a stretch. I throw it into a fictional bag with shit like this:

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Oct 12, 2009 9:14 am MicroBalrog wrote: It's a universe in which there are ALIENS THE SIZE OF SKYSCRAPERS. And the main character RIDES INTO BATTLE IN A 35-METER MECHA THAT IS HIS OWN MOTHER. In such a universe, your (genetically-engineered *warmwater*) penguin being sapient is not THAT far-fetched.

[]:             Quote Post by MicroBalrog » Mon Oct 12, 2009 9:19 am *notices your sig* *worships*

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Oct 12, 2009 9:56 am MicroBalrog wrote: *notices your sig* *worships*

[]:             Quote Post by MicroBalrog » Mon Oct 12, 2009 10:19 am The Eva Monkey wrote: MicroBalrog wrote: *notices your sig* *worships*

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Oct 12, 2009 10:23 am MicroBalrog wrote: I employed... logic?

[]:             Quote Post by MicroBalrog » Mon Oct 12, 2009 10:24 am Sorry, was editing my post as you posted.

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Mon Oct 12, 2009 10:43 am MicroBalrog wrote: http://img.photobucket.com/albums/v42/allanea/screenshots/vlcsnap-5602628.png

[]:             Quote Post by MicroBalrog » Mon Oct 12, 2009 10:45 am Oedipusfoot wrote: MicroBalrog wrote: http://img.photobucket.com/albums/v42/allanea/screenshots/vlcsnap-5602628.png

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Oct 12, 2009 11:09 am Oedipusfoot wrote: MicroBalrog wrote: http://img.photobucket.com/albums/v42/allanea/screenshots/vlcsnap-5602628.png

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Mon Oct 12, 2009 11:33 am You canon I say cannon. Its in the eye of the beholder.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Mon Oct 12, 2009 11:45 am Misato had him for 15 years and...Second impact happen 15 years before that and that is when the Angels were born then. O.O Penpen am Angel! I don't like ur avatar Aaron hahha

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Oct 12, 2009 11:50 am Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: I don't like ur avatar Aaron hahha

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Oct 12, 2009 12:26 pm Stop scaring off the newbies... Pen-Pen gets the cute-animal-mascot dispensation -- if he'd been an African grey parrot, rather than a penguin, he wouldn't've needed even that much.

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Tue Oct 13, 2009 11:33 am Great Genius Shinji-Sama wrote: You canon I say cannon. Its in the eye of the beholder.
